title: AI Agents: Stop Button Building, Start Startup Speed! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that building AI agents requires agility and startup-style iteration rather than traditional software engineering approaches. He contends that startups like Anthropic adapt faster to the unpredictable nature of AI agents than large technology companies.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that building AI agents calls for startup-style iteration rather than traditional software engineering. The claim matters because AI agents behave unpredictably, and the approach used to build them shapes how fast teams can adapt. Imhof contends that startups such as Anthropic adjust to that unpredictability faster than large technology companies.
